_comment: GATE-11 module-size budget. Each entry is the maximum allowed line count (Python splitlines) for that module. Budgets are a ratchet: they may only DECREASE as code is extracted (CQ-1), never increase. The gate fails when a tracked file grows past its budget, or when any untracked file exceeds the default cap (600) without an explicit, acknowledged entry here. Lower these numbers as main_frame.py and friends are decomposed.
